title: Vanilla+ Signs and Boats
description: Mod adding signs, hanging signs, boats and chest boats to all vanilla blocks.
body:
![vanilla+ collection image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/171214c41832d54bc3ae47bf886d660bb8b89acd.png)
# SUMMARY
**Vanilla+ Signs and Boats** Mod is adding boats and signs to (almost) every block in Minecraft. After finishing, it'll allow you to express your opinions on brand new stone, granite and other signs, or roam the world in gold, diamond or even netherite boats. This mod is part of a **Vanilla+ Mod Collection**, covering all branches of Vanilla Minecraft, including:
- [Tools](https://modrinth.com/project/vanilla+-tools)
- [Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla+-blocks).
## BUG TRACKING
If you find any bugs, visual problems etc. please visit the Github issue tracker linked in the summary. thx

discord: alpr01
